name: Amazon Transcribe Transcription Job
description: Schema representing an Amazon Transcribe transcription job resource.

properties.name: TranscriptionJobName
properties.description: The name of the transcription job.

properties.name: TranscriptionJobStatus
properties.description: The status of the transcription job.

properties.name: LanguageCode
properties.description: The language code for the input audio.

properties.name: MediaSampleRateHertz
properties.description: The sample rate of the input audio in Hz.

properties.name: MediaFormat
properties.description: The format of the input media file.

properties.name: Media
properties.description: The location of the input media file.

properties.name: Transcript
properties.description: The location of the transcription output.

properties.name: Settings
properties.description: Optional settings for the transcription job.

properties.name: CreationTime
properties.description: A timestamp indicating when the job was created.

properties.name: StartTime
properties.description: A timestamp indicating when the job started processing.

properties.name: CompletionTime
properties.description: A timestamp indicating when the job was completed.

properties.name: FailureReason
properties.description: The reason the job failed, if applicable.

properties.name: Tags
properties.description: A list of tags associated with the transcription job.
